identity: India's First DIY (Do-It-Yourself) Biolab and Bio Incubator
tagline: Nurturing the next generation of bio startups
focus: Biotechnology, Life Sciences, Health, Deep Tech, and Community-driven Bio-innovation
location: Somaiya Vidyavihar University, Mumbai (part of the riidl ecosystem)
backed_by: DBT (Department of Biotechnology, Government of India)

funding_support.birac_seed_fund: Eligible for BIRAC SEED Fund (up to ₹30 Lakhs per startup)
funding_support.description: Bioriidl connects incubated startups with funding pathways including BIRAC schemes and the broader riidl investor network

about.summary: Bioriidl is a bio incubator supporting early-stage startups working at the intersection of biology, health, and deep tech. It provides founders with space, tools, mentoring, and community to transform research-driven concepts into scalable ventures.
about.mission: From idea to impact — accelerate innovation from prototype to real-world impact through lab access, business support, and peer-learning.
what_we_enable: Startup-friendly workspace with 24/7 access for incubated startups

community.description: Founders join a collaborative network of innovators, researchers, mentors, and industry partners with knowledge-sharing, co-creation, and a culture of openness and experimentation.

partner_platform.name: Darwin
partner_platform.description: Enhances startup visibility and discovery, connecting teams to resources, collaborators, and networks across Bioriidl and riidl

programs.summary: Cohorts, bootcamps, and hands-on academy courses — technical, regulatory, and market training designed for science-first founders with focus on lab-readiness, safety, and real-world deployment.

featured.name: Startup School India
featured.description: A national initiative bringing founders together for practical sessions, mentorship, and community-driven growth. Ideal for early-stage teams seeking peer feedback and investor-ready preparation.

offerings.name: Startup Bootcamp Program
offerings.description: Intensive hands-on sprint for early-stage teams covering rapid prototyping, customer validation, demo-day preparation, product development, business development, and lab-readiness.

offerings.name: Bio Entrepreneurship Program (BEP)
offerings.description: Cohort-based program for bio founders blending regulation, lab practices, fundraising readiness, and go-to-market guidance.

offerings.name: Bio Academy
offerings.description: Short modular courses on lab methods, safety, and bioinformatics for founders and researchers.

offerings.name: Bio Informatics
offerings.description: Workshops and practical training on bioinformatics workflows, data analysis, and building web tools for biological data.

offerings.name: Startup School India
offerings.description: Community-led learning and mentoring with session series and peer cohorts connecting founders with mentors.

startups.summary: Bioriidl nucleates and nurtures technology and knowledge-based enterprises leveraging biotechnology across biopharma, agrobiotech, industrial biotech, and clean technology.

incubated_startups.name: Health-Eatos
incubated_startups.description: Makes nachos from beans high in nutrition and protein — a healthy, fibre-rich, affordable snack. Originated as a final year project from KJ Somaiya College of Science and Commerce.

incubated_startups.name: AgroBeads
incubated_startups.description: Accelerates plant growth and productivity with beads placed near roots. Enhances roots, shoots, fruits, and leaf span with no soil side effects. Tested at lab scale and for home gardening; helps remediate phosphate-contaminated land.

incubated_startups.name: Dog My Love
incubated_startups.description: Dog care products and accessories shop (collars, leashes, food, toys, houses, beds, brushes, bowls) started by S K Somaiya Vinaymandir Junior College students.

incubated_startups.name: Indra
incubated_startups.description: Incubated startup working on innovative technology-driven solutions.

incubated_startups.name: i-Band
incubated_startups.description: Incubated startup focused on impactful healthcare technology solutions.

incubated_startups.name: Quest Dental
incubated_startups.description: Incubated startup addressing dental healthcare challenges through innovative solutions.

incubated_startups.name: UFarm
incubated_startups.description: Incubated startup working in the agriculture domain.

diy_biolab.summary: An open community biology lab for students, inventors, entrepreneurs, and anyone who wants to experiment, share, learn, and build. A shared, open-access biological workspace that lowers the entry barrier to hands-on experimentation.

Molecular Biology Lab: Biological Safety Cabinet Class II A2 with Thimble Ducting
Cell Culture Lab: Biological Safety Cabinet Class II A2 with Thimble Ducting
Multifuge Centrifuge (Swing bucket and fixed angle rotors)

key_initiatives: Support for independent researchers and DIY Bio enthusiasts

ibsc.summary: Regulatory oversight for research involving genetically engineered organisms, hazardous microorganisms, and recombinant DNA.
ibsc.registration: Registered and accredited under DBT (Department of Biotechnology), Ministry of Science and Technology, Government of India — RIIDL Foundation IBSC

regulatory_framework.governing_rules: Rules for Manufacture, Use, Import, Export and Storage of Hazardous Microorganisms, Genetically Engineered Organisms or Cells, 1989 (Rules 1989) under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (MoEF&CC)
regulatory_framework.scope: Covers manufacture, import, research, and release of Genetically Engineered Organisms (GEOs) and hazardous microorganisms
responsibilities: Review and grant clearance for restricted-category GMO, LMO, and rDNA research proposals
Formulate biosafety programs and conduct onsite evaluations
Monitor research facilities for adherence to biosafety guidelines
Oversee regulatory process, update PIs on approvals/rejections
Assess field experiments and review emergency plans

committee_members.name: Dr Jyotirlatha Bangera
committee_members.affiliation: Professor & Head of Department, K. J. Somaiya Medical College

committee_members.name: Dr Maithili Athavale
committee_members.affiliation: Assistant General Manager R&D, Godavari Biorefineries

committee_members.name: Dr Lolly Jain
committee_members.affiliation: Vice Principal, K. J. Somaiya College of Science and Commerce

committee_members.name: Dr Kafil Ahmed
committee_members.affiliation: Chief Scientific Officer, Techinvention Lifecare Pvt Ltd

steps: Download the application form from the IBSC Protocol Form link on the website
Submit hard copy to Member Secretary, RIIDL Foundation, and soft copy via email to bhavna.pandya@somaiya.edu (CC: apekshakumari@somaiya.edu)
Submit at least 30 days prior to scheduled IBSC meetings
Principal Investigators must inform IBSC of rDNA, GMO, or LMO work before applying for external grants
selection_process: IBSC schedules a meeting and informs applicant at least 15 days in advance
Applicant presents the proposal during the IBSC meeting
Decision communicated within one week after the meeting

riidl_ecosystem.summary: Bioriidl operates within the riidl (Research Innovation Incubation Design Laboratory) ecosystem at Somaiya Vidyavihar University, Mumbai — providing broader incubation, labs, and startup support beyond bio-specific programs.

riidl_labs.name: Fabrication Lab (FABLAB)
riidl_labs.description: MIT-supported fabrication space with 3D printers and precision machines for prototyping

riidl_labs.name: Media Lab
riidl_labs.description: Multimedia production tools for content creation and editing

riidl_labs.name: AI/ML Lab
riidl_labs.description: Advanced computing resources for artificial intelligence and machine learning research

riidl_labs.name: AR/VR Lab
riidl_labs.description: Augmented and virtual reality tools for immersive digital experiences

riidl_labs.name: Bio Lab
riidl_labs.description: BIRAC-supported life sciences lab for biology, genetics, and biotechnology research (connected to Bioriidl DIY Biolab)

riidl_ecosystem.facility_booking: Labs can be booked via https://riidl.org/booking for students, faculty, startups, riidl staff, and lab members

how_to_apply.lab_booking: Book riidl lab facilities via https://riidl.org/booking
how_to_apply.ibsc_clearance: Submit IBSC application forms at least 30 days before scheduled meetings — see https://www.bioriidl.org/ibsc
